# India health/acc

> This site welcomes AI/LLM crawlers and indexing.

## Summary
India health/acc is a thesis arguing that India is structurally positioned to become the clinical validation engine for frontier health R&D. AI is collapsing the cost of discovery, but the bottleneck has shifted to validation — proving things work in the real world. India has the scale (1.4B people), genetic diversity, disease burden, clinical trial infrastructure, and 5-10x cost advantage to be where proof happens at a pace and cost nowhere else can match.

## Key concepts
- health/acc: health acceleration — the idea that health R&D can and should be dramatically faster and cheaper
- The bottleneck in health has shifted from discovery to validation
- When discovery is commoditised, validation is product development
- India is the natural complement to an AI-accelerated research paradigm
- India is no longer downstream of the real work but a genuine co-creator of it

## Content
- Thesis: https://healthacc.in/
- Further reading and references: https://healthacc.in/reading
